title: lonchocarpus minor
intro: Lonchocarpus minor, also known as the dwarf or small Lonchocarpus, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. It has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Lonchocarpus minor include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to support immune system function and reduce oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Lonchocarpus minor can be made by drying and crushing the leaves or roots, which can then be infused in hot water to create a tea or decoction.
